race.comment: MT SHIRATAKU (3) trialled well coming into this campaign but was grabbed late in a photo finish first-up 14 days ago. He hasn't won for a while now but has only had 3 wins since his last win. Should be fitter for that effort and this looks to shape nicely for him. Can go one better this time around. GO GO GROMMET (2) finished off strongly to edge out MT SHIRATAKU last time out and draws a better barrier this time around. Can sit handier this time around from a good draw but he does get a weight swing against him. Wouldn't surprise to see him get the job done again. ACORN (4) is better than he showed last time out when 3.7L off the winner. He comes through the same race as GO GO GROMMET and Pike sticks with him. Drops in weight and an improved showing is expected. BARTIME (5) is better than he showed last start and can bounce back with the drop in trip. DIAMONDS'N'RUBIES (11) will find this tougher but rates well on her last start effort.
